mapper.select: SELECT id, item_code, hierarchy, item_model, sync_flag, deleted_flag, created_at, updated_at FROM consignment_item_setup WHERE item_code = #{itemCode} AND deleted_flag = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consignment_item_setup ( item_code, hierarchy, item_model, sync_flag, deleted_flag, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{itemCode}, #{hierarchy}, #{itemModel}, #{syncFlag}, #{deletedFlag}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON CONFLICT (item_code) DO UPDATE SET hierarchy = EXCLUDED.hierarchy, item_model = EXCLUDED.item_model, sync_flag = EXCLUDED.sync_flag, deleted_flag = EXCLUDED.deleted_flag, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
